violations.text: Menu is lacking an allergy statement. English Food Allergies What You Need to Know English Food Allergy Reactions New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2024
Shellstock tags did not have all of the required information. The dates of last use were lacking. New Violation. Correct By: 03/07/2024

Raw animal foods (such as assorted meats) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as wine) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from ready to eat foods during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/07/2024

Working containers of numerous dry ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 03/07/2024

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the basement back storage area. New Violation. Correct By: 03/07/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: mandolin can opener prep units sheet pan rack grill area beneath grill New Violation. Correct By: 03/07/2024
The grease recycling bin and surrounding area has an accumulation of grease. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2024
The fan covers in the walk in cooler have an accumulation of dust and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/07/2024
